ogTitle: Villeneuve vs Vinegar Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Villeneuve and Vinegar Hill.
heading: Villeneuve vs Vinegar Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Villeneuve, Queensland and Vinegar Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Villeneuve has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Vinegar Hill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Villeneuve or Vinegar Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Villeneuve has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Vinegar Hill scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Villeneuve scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Vinegar Hill scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Villeneuve or Vinegar Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Villeneuve has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
